title: Tag an Image
description:
## Add a New Reference to an Image

Tagging gives an existing image an additional name — for example to prepare it for a registry or to mark a release.

**Requirements:**
1. Starting from the **`alpine:latest`** image, create a new tag **`myalpine:stable`** pointing at it

> 💡 `docker tag <source> <target>`. The `alpine:latest` image has been pulled for you. Verify with `docker images myalpine`.

hints.title: Re-tag an image
hints.body: docker tag creates another reference to the same underlying image ID — no rebuild or copy.

validation.description: Checks that an image tagged myalpine:stable exists.
